title: 60 Colours Dual Tip Brush Pens Colouring Pens for Adults & Beginners, Fineliner and Felt Tip Coloured Pens, Art Markers Set for Drawing Painting Calligraphy Sketching
features: 🎨 [Dual Tip Design]: Each Lurmivex dual tip colouring pen features a 1.2mm soft brush tip for smooth colouring, blending, and calligraphy, and a 0.4mm felt fine tip, perfect for precise detailing, outlining, and writing. This versatile colouring pens set offers one pen with endless creative possibilities—ideal for journaling, sketching, and professional artwork.

🖍️ [60 Vibrant Colours]: Choose from 60 rich and vivid coloured pens, including primary and complementary shades. Whether you're shading, layering, highlighting, or adding intricate details, Lurmivex dual tip colouring pens provide seamless colour flow for effortless creativity on every page.

🧰 [Stylish & Travel-Friendly Case]: This colouring pens set comes neatly organised in a durable tray housed inside a sleek protective case—great for storage and portability. The tight-fitting caps prevent ink from drying out, making these art markers perfect for artists, and creators on the go.

🌟 [Premium Ink Quality]: Filled with water-based, odour-free, and fade-resistant ink, Lurmivex colouring pens ensure bold, streak-free results every time. Designed for durability and comfort, reliable, and trusted by teachers, hobbyists, and professional illustrators. A perfect gift for birthdays, Halloween, and Christmas.

💬 [Reliable 24/7 Customer Support]: We’re always here to help. Whether you have questions, need assistance, or wish to return your product, our friendly customer service team is available 24/7 to ensure your experience is smooth and stress-free.
